description: Authoritative bounded low-risk action catalog for Class 1 assistance and bounded caregiver-confirmable action scope. This asset defines the canonical low-risk action domain and should not be overridden by summarized policy-table copies or companion output-profile assets.

policy_notes.authoritative_scope_note: This file is the authoritative low-risk action source for policy routing summaries, deterministic validation, and bounded caregiver confirmation support.
policy_notes.caregiver_confirmation_boundary: Caregiver confirmation support for Class 1 low-risk assistance must not authorize actions outside this catalog. Sensitive actuation approval, if implemented, must be governed by a separate explicit policy and manual confirmation path.
policy_notes.context_schema_alignment_note: Allowed target devices should remain aligned with the current device_states schema used by the operational context contract.

implementation_notes.llm_role: The LLM may propose bounded Class 1 candidate actions, but it is not the autonomous execution authority.
implementation_notes.validator_role: The deterministic validator remains the approval authority for single admissible low-risk actions before dispatch.
implementation_notes.actuation_note: Requires ACK before final success confirmation when requires_ack=true.
